introSection: Freischütz is a Maurer Rides built sit-down launched roller coaster located at Bayern Park in Reisbach, Bavaria, Germany.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Freischütz opened on 21 August 2011.

The ride was closed from the start of the 2022 season until June.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows for a total of 12 riders per train

fullText:
Freischütz is a Maurer Rides built sit-down launched roller coaster located at Bayern Park in Reisbach, Bavaria, Germany.

Freischütz opened on 21 August 2011.

The ride was closed from the start of the 2022 season until June.



2 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows for a total of 12 riders per train
